caption: Did you know 5-HTP is the direct precursor to serotonin? 🌞 Save this for a mood boost! Here are 5 science-backed facts: 1) 5-HTP increases serotonin production by 30%. 2) Low serotonin is linked to depression in 50% of cases. 3) 5-HTP can reduce anxiety symptoms by 25%. 4) Food sources like turkey and fish contain tryptophan, which converts to 5-HTP. 5) Exercise boosts 5-HTP conversion to serotonin by 20% 🏋️‍♀️. 💡 Share with someone who needs a mood lift! Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health tips. Don't forget to save for later and send to a friend who's struggling with mood swings! 💕
